name: Learn the Language of png - Papua New Guinea
snippet: Common Phrases ; What is your name? Wanem nem bilong yu? ; Who are you? Yu whosait? ; My name is (Joe). Nem bilong mi (Joe) ; Thank you very much. tenk yu tru(e).

name: Maninka language - Wikipedia
snippet: It is the mother tongue of the Malinké people in Guinea, where it is spoken by 3.1 million people and is the main language in the Upper Guinea region.
